# Third-Party Sources

Third-party metadata is camera-focused for this workspace.

Tracked components:

- `VCamSample`: Media Foundation virtual camera prototype.
- `softcam`: DirectShow virtual camera provider.
- `libusbmuxd` and `usbmuxd`: USBMux reference/proxy tooling.

Use `third_party/fetch-third-party.ps1 -Status` to inspect local checkout state without changing the system.
